content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids every priority anti-pattern across the full conversation, and actively declines bait that would have triggered several. When the client asks 'how do I find my way back' (turn 15), the coach refuses the fixing-people bait by redirecting to present-moment inquiry instead of giving strategy. When the client pushes back at turn 13 ('we got to hold off on the insights'), the coach receives with a simple 'Okay' — the textbook avoidance of defending/explaining/pushing, and a refusal to love-to-transform. At turn 22, the 'I'm sorry' is genuine receiving rather than reframing or coaching the pain. At turn 26, the coach affirms 'you're a victim, bro' rather than colluding with the client's resistance to victim-identity, avoiding dont-shame-your-grief-process. Shame is met with 'how would you enjoy your shame?' (turn 34) rather than fought or silenced — clean avoidance of dont-fight-the-voice and trying-to-get-rid-of-the-emotion. No methodology jargon is evangelized; questions are connecting, not extracting; no advice given. The coach demonstrates positive avoidance of loving-to-transform throughout — there is no escalating push for breakthrough.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 14, 16, 22, 26, 34, 36, 40],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to engage the future-fix frame; redirects to NOW without lecturing — anti-fixing."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Meets resistance with 'Okay.' Avoids defending or re-asserting — textbook avoidance of loving-to-transform and view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes rush AS potential enjoyment rather than fixing the rush — avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Simple 'I'm sorry' — does not coach, reframe, or extract. Avoids impartial-apathy and fixing."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Affirms victim status rather than colluding with the resistance — avoids dont-shame-your-grief-process."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Self-disclosure used as material/connection rather than performance — does not tip into vulnerability-as-control."},
    {"turn": 34, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Enjoy-the-shame move — does not fight the shame voice or try to get rid of the emotion."},
    {"turn": 40, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Experimental framing rather than prescription — avoids fixing and half-assed-experiment."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["frame-it-as-an-experiment", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "treat-yourself-as-actor-of-emotion", "shame-as-disconnection", "feel-your-way-to-freedom", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "are-you-bracing-or-embracing"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Strong demonstration of refusal-to-transform. The turn-14 'Okay' is the single clearest anti-pattern-avoidance signal in the transcript."
}
